case_title: JOHN HUNSAKER VS. TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,257.12 FILED BY HUNSAKER, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES ANNUZZI, ROSA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-10-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $75.00 SERVED JUN-24-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO ROSA ANNUZZI BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JUL-10-2013 AT 3:30 PM.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-10-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-10-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JACKY LOPEZ--TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICE AND SEAN CLAYBAUGH--PROPERTY MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-10-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUNSAKER, JOHN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES $700.00 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $900.00, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST ROSA ANNUZZI IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 SERVED JUN-24-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ANNUZZI, ROSA
